name: HMS Glory (62)
events: The page of HMS Glory was last updated in February 2023.
21 Feb 1945 At 1200 B/21, HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) is commissioned for trials at Belfast. (1)
23 Mar 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted D/G trials in Belfast Lough. She anchored off Bangor for the night. (2)

24 Mar 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) proceeded from Bangor to the Clyde. En-route several trials were carried out, including full power trials. She was escorted by HMS Walker (Lt. T.W. Lancaster, DSC, RN) and the frigate HMS Inman (T/A/Lt.Cdr. H.E. Petre, RNR).
HMS Glory arrived at Greenock later the same day. (2)
26 Mar 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted trials in the Clyde area. (2)
30 Mar 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying trials in the Clyde area. (2)
31 Mar 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying trials in the Clyde area. (2)
2 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying trials in the Clyde area.
Also she was accepted for service on this day. (3)
4 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
5 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
7 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
9 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
10 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
13 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
14 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
16 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
17 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
18 Apr 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
6 May 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted engine trials and flying exercises in the Clyde area. (4)

14 May 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) departed Glasgow for Malta with a brief stopover at Gibraltar. She was escorted by the destroyers HMS Icarus (Lt.Cdr. D.D. Bone, RN), HMS Hotspur (Lt.Cdr. D.R. Mallinson, RN) and HMS Escapade (Lt.Cdr. H.R.A. Kidston, RN).
Around 2000 B/16, HMS Icarus and HMS Hotspur parted company.
Around 1100 B/18, HMS Glory and HMS Escapade arrived at Gibraltar.
Around 1745 B/18, HMS Glory departed Gibraltar for Malta. [No info available on a possible escort, most likely she proceeded unescorted.]
Around 1400 B/21, HMS Glory arrived at Malta. (4)

22 May 1945 Around 0630 B/22, the light aircraft carriers HMS Venerable (Capt. W.A. Dallmeyer, DSO, RN, flying the flag of Rear-Admiral R.J.H. Harcourt, CB, CBE, RN), HMS Vengeance (Capt. D.M.L. Neame, DSO and Bar, RN) and HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) departed Malta for Alexandria. They were escorted by the destroyer HMS Tuscan (Lt.Cdr. P.B.N. Lewis, DSC, RN). (5)

25 May 1945 Around 1400 C/25, HMS Venerable (Capt. W.A. Dallmeyer, DSO, RN, flying the flag of Rear-Admiral R.J.H. Harcourt, CB, CBE, RN), HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Tuscan (Lt.Cdr. P.B.N. Lewis, DSC, RN) arrived at Alexandria from Malta after having carried out exercises during the last night.
HMS Vengeance (Capt. D.M.L. Neame, DSO and Bar, RN) did not participate in these exercises and had already put into Alexandria around 1415 C/24. (5)
29 May 1945 From 29 to 31 May 1945, HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria.
In the afternoon of 30 May the destroyer Artigliere joined company.
In the morning of 31 May the destroyer HMS Musketeer (Cdr. G.M. Sladen, DSO, DSC, RN) joined company replacing the Artigliere. (6)
1 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria. She was, most likely, escorted by the destroyer Artigliere. (7)
2 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria. (8)
9 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) is docked in floating dock AFD 5 at Alexandria. (7)
16 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) is undocked. (8)
18 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria. (8)
19 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria. She was, most likely, escorted by the escort destroyer RHS Miaoulis. (7)
21 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria. She was, most likely, escorted by the escort destroyer RHS Miaoulis. (7)
22 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria. She was, most likely, escorted by the escort destroyer RHS Miaoulis. (7)
23 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Alexandria. She was, most likely, escorted by the escort destroyer RHS Miaoulis. (7)
25 Jun 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted exercises off Alexandria. (8)
26 Jun 1945 During 26/27 June 1945, HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted exercises off Alexandria. These included flying exercises. (8)
28 Jun 1945 During 28/29 June 1945, HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted exercises off Alexandria. These included flying exercises. (8)
2 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) departed Alexandria for Port Tewfik. She is escorted by HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) (9)

3 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Port Tewfik after having passed the Suez Canal southbound. They departed for Colombo later the same day. (9)
5 Jul 1945 HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) fuelled at sea from HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN). (9)
12 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Colombo from Port Tewfik. (9)
15 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) departed Colombo for Trincomalee. (9)
16 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Trincomalee from Colombo. (9)
21 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) departed Trincomalee for Colombo. (9)
22 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) arrived at Colombo from Trincomalee. (9)
27 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) departed Colombo for Trincomalee. (9)
28 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Trincomalee from Colombo. (9)
29 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) conducted flying exercises off Trincomalee. She was escorted by HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN). (9)
31 Jul 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) departed Trincomalee for Colombo. (9)
1 Aug 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Colombo from Trincomalee. (10)
3 Aug 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) departed Colombo for Sydney via Fremantle. (10)
5 Aug 1945 HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) fuelled at sea from HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN). (10)
7 Aug 1945 HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) fuelled at sea from HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN). (10)
10 Aug 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Fremantle from Colombo. (10)
11 Aug 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) departed Fremantle for Sydney. (10)
16 Aug 1945 HMS Glory (Capt. A.W. Buzzard, DSO, OBE, RN) and HMS Wizard (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hodgkinson, DSC and Bar, RN) arrived at Sydney from Fremantle. (10)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
